title: Grinder modpack
description:
We provide Minecraft 1.0.0 carefully selected for those who want to focus on their work.
This is an image picture.
body:
**Work Efficiency-Focused Modpack (Fabric 1.19.4)**
Overview
This modpack is designed to optimize tasks like building, terraforming, and automation in Minecraft. Built for Fabric 1.19.4, it is a lightweight modpack that emphasizes ease of use and features carefully selected mods for visual assistance and convenient functionality. Its simple and user-friendly configuration ensures that players of all skill levels, from beginners to experts, can enjoy a seamless work experience.

**Features**
Building Support Tools
Streamline your building tasks with Litematica and Litematica Printer, enabling smooth progress even with complex constructions.

**Enhanced Work Efficiency**
Boost your productivity with mods like Tweakeroo and Item Scroller, which maximize inventory management and block placement efficiency, making tasks more intuitive.

**Visual Assistance**
Display vital in-game information easily with MiniHUD. Its advanced customization options allow you to adapt it to any situation.

**Improved Performance**
Achieve smooth gameplay even with high-quality settings using Sodium and Iris, ensuring a perfect balance between lightweight performance and stunning visuals.

**Convenient UI and Configuration**
Enjoy a better user experience with support mods like Mod Menu, Zoomify, and Inventory Profiles Next, all designed to enhance functionality and ease of use.

**Included Mods**
Work Support & Utility
Litematica / Litematica Printer
Tools for blueprint-based construction and automated building assistance.
Tweakeroo
Provides various options for improving work efficiency.
Item Scroller
Makes inventory operations more convenient.
MiniHUD
Displays in-game information on-screen.
Performance Enhancement
Sodium / Sodium Extra / Reese's Sodium Options
Dramatically improves rendering performance.
Iris
High-performance shader support.
UI & Accessibility
Zoomify
Extends the vanilla zoom feature.
Inventory Profiles Next
Simplifies inventory organization and operations.
Mod Menu
Provides an intuitive mod management interface.
Core Libraries
Fabric API
Essential library for Fabric Modloader.
Malilib
Required library for Litematica and Tweakeroo.
Fabric Language Kotlin
Supports mods developed in Kotlin.
YetAnotherConfigLib
Simplifies mod configuration.
libIPN
Library for Inventory Profiles Next.
**Want multiplayer?**

You can play multiplayer right away with e4mc. without opening ports. Please note that the other party must also have the same modpack installed.
Recommended Specifications
Minecraft Version: Fabric 1.19.4
By Using This Modpack, You Can...
Progress intuitively and efficiently with complex building tasks.
Enjoy smooth inventory management and item handling.
Experience lightweight yet high-performance gameplay.
Discover a whole new level of productivity with this modpack and revolutionize your Minecraft experience!
